failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, so the agent could not obtain the product evidence needed to answer the price question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan were correct: use ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id, then answer from returned evidence. The tool invocation at index 3 was well-formed and used the required arguments. The failure was an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This prevented evidence retrieval and was not later resolved.
